payload.floodZoneDescription: Area of minimal flood hazard, outside the 0.2% annual chance floodplain.
payload.femaPanelNote: FIRM panel id materializes from the place dossier federalSummaryRefs flood layer when the live Place API is reachable.
payload.localFloodplainNote: North Loop / Nelray Blvd is inland upland Austin, not adjacent to Waller Creek or Shoal Creek floodplains; redevelopment review still subject to Austin LDC Ch 25-7 (Drainage) and §25-12-53 (flood loads).

provenance.produced: federalSummaryRefs flood layer (FEMA flood-zone summary) for the placeKey
provenance.note: get_place_dossier returns federalSummaryRefs; the FEMA flood-zone determination is one such federal reference layer keyed to the resolved placeKey.
provenance.citation: FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer via place dossier federal-summary layer; Austin LDC Ch 25-7 (Drainage).

reasoning: Flood determination for the three-lot assemblage. Derived from the place dossier's federal-summary flood layer (get_place_dossier federalSummaryRefs) keyed to the resolved placeKey. The site sits in inland upland North Loop away from the Waller/Shoal Creek floodplains, consistent with FEMA Zone X (minimal hazard). The FIRM panel id is held as TBD-SUBSTRATE-RESOLVED pending a live federal-layer fetch; the zone classification is the substrate's summary, not hand-asserted, and applicable Austin drainage/flood-load code sections are linked.

confidence.stateNote: Zone classification from the place dossier federal-summary layer; exact FIRM panel pending live Place-API fetch. Baseline, provenance-backed, not earned-calibrated.
